content.query:
use nyc_taxi_discovery;

-- check duplicates from taxi zone data
select 
    location_id,
    count(1) as number_of_records
from 
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/taxi_zone.csv',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'csv',
        -- PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        FIRSTROW = 2,
        FIELDTERMINATOR = ',',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '\n'
    ) with (
        location_id SMALLINT 1,
        borough VARCHAR(15) 2,
        zone VARCHAR(50) 3,
        service_zone VARCHAR(15) 4 
    ) as [result]
GROUP BY location_id
HAVING count(*) > 1;

select 
    borough,
    count(1) as number_of_records
from 
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/taxi_zone.csv',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'csv',
        -- PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        FIRSTROW = 2,
        FIELDTERMINATOR = ',',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '\n'
    ) with (
        location_id SMALLINT 1,
        borough VARCHAR(15) 2,
        zone VARCHAR(50) 3,
        service_zone VARCHAR(15) 4 
    ) as [result]
GROUP BY borough
HAVING count(1) > 1;

--- Identifying Data Quality Issues in trip total amount
select 
    top 100 * 
FROM 
    OPENROWSET(
       BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=2020/month=01/',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result];

select 
    min(total_amount) as min_total_amount,
    MAX(total_amount) as max_total_amount,
    AVG(total_amount) as avg_total_amount,
    COUNT(1) as total_number_of_records,
    COUNT(total_amount) as not_null_total_no_of_records
FROM 
    OPENROWSET(
       BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=2020/month=01/',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result];

select 
    top 100 * 
FROM 
    OPENROWSET(
       BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=2020/month=01/',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
where total_amount < 0;

SELECT 
    payment_type,
    description
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/payment_type.json',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'csv',
        FIELDTERMINATOR = '0x0b',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b'
    ) WITH (
        jsonDoc NVARCHAR(3000)
    ) AS payment_type
    CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(jsonDoc) 
    WITH(
     payment_type smallint,
     description VARCHAR(20) '$.payment_type_desc'
    );

SELECT 
    payment_type,
    count(1) as number_of_records
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=*/month=*/*',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
        FORMAT = 'parquet'
    ) AS payment_type
GROUP BY payment_type
ORDER BY payment_type;

--- JOINING FILES 
SELECT TOP 100 *
FROM OPENROWSET (
    BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=2020/month=01/',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
    FORMAT = 'parquet'
) AS result
WHERE PULocationID IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    trip_data.*, taxi_zone.*
FROM OPENROWSET (
    BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=2020/month=01/',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
    FORMAT = 'parquet'
) AS trip_data
    JOIN
    OPENROWSET (
                    BULK 'raw/taxi_zone.csv',
                    DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
                    FORMAT = 'CSV',
                    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
                    FIRSTROW = 2
            ) WITH(
                    location_id SMALLINT 1,  
                    borough VARCHAR(15) 2,   
                    zone VARCHAR(50) 3,               
                    service_zone VARCHAR(15) 4
                ) AS taxi_zone
    ON trip_data.PULocationID = taxi_zone.location_id;

SELECT 
    taxi_zone.borough, COUNT(1) as number_of_trips
FROM OPENROWSET (
    BULK 'raw/trip_data_green_parquet/year=2020/month=01/',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
    FORMAT = 'parquet'
) AS trip_data
    JOIN
    OPENROWSET (
                    BULK 'raw/taxi_zone.csv',
                    DATA_SOURCE = 'nyc_taxi_data',
                    FORMAT = 'CSV',
                    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
                    FIRSTROW = 2
            ) WITH(
                    location_id SMALLINT 1,  
                    borough VARCHAR(15) 2,   
                    zone VARCHAR(50) 3,               
                    service_zone VARCHAR(15) 4
                ) AS taxi_zone
    ON trip_data.PULocationID = taxi_zone.location_id
    GROUP BY taxi_zone.borough
    ORDER BY number_of_trips desc;

---------------------------------------- TRANSFORMATIONS -----------------------------------
